title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kid, Unknown person #10, Denjiro, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the day you finally get caught!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He went that way!! Capture Kin'Emon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just trying to cash in a bounty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am not lying!! Just let me go to the Kurokoma family's mansion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Catch him and play him alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...is what I would normally say, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha, you must be joking!! We will bring him in right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The bigger ones are worth 60 pieces of silver, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but I can trade this pot back in for 30 pieces of silver, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... if you add the extra 30 pieces of silver I spent when I bought this pot...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To the value of trading it in now, it should be worth 60 pieces of silver! So I should be able to get a big one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose you are right!! Here you go!! Please come again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The brat got a discount just like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How did I end up with only 30 pieces of silver...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sir Samuel, please do something about him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know this is odd for a funeral, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: regard- less, what is the matter....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After cremation, we were going to collect the ashes, but then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, just look over there!! He is using the fire that burnt my father's body to boil some oden!!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: THIS IS REALLY... Huff... huff... puff... puff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not understand what you are saying, but get off of my father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is an insult to his memory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We drink together, Katsuzo, it will be in the afterlife.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He is not one for detailed Explana- Tions!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
